programme.title: DISERUDUK CINTA KONGLOMERAT KW
programme.desc: To help her fussy younger brother, Sarah (Angelica Simperler) heads to a village to find her former helper, Bi Ijah. On the way, she nearly hits a runaway sheep belonging to Gilang (Ridho Ilahi). Since Gilang is Bi Ijah's son, he lets the incident slide. Seeing an opportunity to escape an arranged marriage, Sarah suddenly asks Gilang to pose as a fake billionaire.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ngeselin Tapi Ngangenin Pemirsa
programme.desc: The headstrong Reno (Alzi Markers) is determined to apply as a teacher at a private school. Unfortunately, he has to deal with Intan (Larasati Nugroho), a beautiful but fussy and talkative fellow teacher. Their bickering makes Reno's life miserable, even leading to him getting sprayed with water by the students because of her antics.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 104
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ENERGI CINTA CINDERELLA MATRE
programme.desc: Yunita Siregar is dreaming of a rich and handsome husband, though it feels like reaching for the moon. When Lucky Perdana enters the picture, she wonders if he finally fits her criteria. But the road to love isn't clear, as Rizky Billar is ready to swoop in and steal her heart from behind the scenes.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ogah Pacaran Semua Cewek Sama Aja!
programme.desc: Both nursing broken hearts, Farel and Rachel decide to team up. Farel's management hires Rachel-a martial arts expert-to become a film star who will 'kick' Farel on screen. However, their collaboration hits a snag when Rachel hears a rumor that Farel secretly enjoys belittling others.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: GURU KARATEKU KECE BADAI
programme.desc: Distracted by her own heavy thoughts, Andini (Ariel Tatum) accidentally hits Damar (Lucky Perdana) with her motorcycle. She manages to flee, but Damar later finds her being chased by a group of people. Even though Damar saves her, he's annoyed because instead of thanking him, Andini lashes out. However, knowing Damar is a karate instructor, Andini eventually begs him to be her personal bodyguard.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 105
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: DARI AKI BUAT KAMU
programme.desc: Pandu and Tita have been dating since college, but even after graduating, Tita is too scared to introduce Pandu to her family. Her parents strictly forbid her from dating because her late grandfather had already arranged for her to marry another man.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 157
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Rayuanmu Tak Semanis Durianku
programme.desc: Pressure is on for Bastian (Masaji Wijayanto) when his father demands he introduce a girlfriend. Desperate, he asks Gea (Ina Marika) to be his fake partner. Gea agrees, but with one smelly condition: Bastian must help her sell durians-the one fruit he absolutely detests.

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU
programme.desc: To pursue her dream of becoming a singer, Pipit (Larasati Nugroho) always performs wearing a mask. Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 158
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cuma Mau Bilang, Tipis Tipis Kep!
programme.desc: Seeking revenge on her ex, Rendy (Eduard Sidik), Violla successfully ruins his event with the help of a man she hired as her fake boyfriend. However, the plan backfires in a sweet way as Violla finds herself becoming genuinely attached to Tristan (Fendy Chow), her 'rented' partner.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 612
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU

Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 1
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 8
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 8
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 22
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Hantu Raya Pergi Perang - EP 6
programme.desc: Kadir Osman seorang bangsa Kg Geliga, membuat keputusan untuk mendapatkan hantu raya dari Pawangis untuk mengorat cinta hatinya Manisah dan menggantikan dirinya di medan perang apabila Null Corp menyerang.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 18
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 4
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 8
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 7
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 19
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan temubual bicara bersama pelawak yang di pentas kan di atas trak di kawasan luar bandar

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program sketsa komedi yang menampilkan barisan pelawak dan pelakon popular seperti Kamal Adli, Sherry Al-Hadad, Shahrul Shiro, Mamak Puteh dan ramai lagi

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 4
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 18
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 2
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 9
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Debunk Beraya
programme.desc: Sofi dan rakannya Kembali ke hospital lama untuk mencari dan memastikan kewujudan Edna di bulan puasa. Tanpa disangka, Edna kini telah mengikuti Sofi untuk pulang ke kampung menyambut raya bersama.

programme.title: Bila Aidil Ada Fitri - EP 4
programme.desc: Pada Raya tahun lepas, Fitri dan Aidilmempunyai masalah dimana Fitri soal jodoh Aidil pula putus tunang. Fitri menyelamatkan Datin Mariam dari diragut dan dia meminta Fitri menjadi P.A anaknya.

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 9
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 4
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 2
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 4 - EP 7
programme.desc: Candawara masak-memasak paling gempak ini menyaksikan persaingan di antara jaguh-jaguh kampung

programme.title: Hantu Raya Pergi Perang - EP 7
programme.desc: Kadir Osman seorang bangsa Kg Geliga, membuat keputusan untuk mendapatkan hantu raya dari Pawangis untuk mengorat cinta hatinya Manisah dan menggantikan dirinya di medan perang apabila Null Corp menyerang.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 2
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Layan Je Maharaja Lawak - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Aaron & Zizan Raya Seram Sejuk
programme.desc: Aaron Aziz & Zizan Razak kembali sekali lagi menghantui raya anda bersama perangkap-perangkap baru yang lebih mendebarkan.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends - EP 12
programme.desc: Bocey & Friends, rancangan sitcom yang di bintangi oleh Achey, Fad, Abam, Zulin dan artis jemputan.

programme.title: Ek Chatur Naar

programme.desc: Jagatpal raises his nephews, Ram and Balram, after killing their parents. He hatches an evil plan to push Ram into the world of smuggling and earn money, but the brothers unite to take him down.

programme.title: Dil Toh Baccha Hai Ji
programme.desc: Three roommates are in search of true love. They each find a girl with whom they fall head over heels in love with. Now they just have to get the women to reciprocate

programme.desc: Manservant Bhola is secretly in love with his master's granddaughter but she is set to wed another. But the dowry-demanding groom absconds with the money and Bhola is sent to bring him back.

programme.title: Phagun
programme.desc: Shanta Damle unable to live alone after her daughter's marriage, moves in with her - much to the displeasure of Suman, her son-in-law, who detests her when he learns her motive.

programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: Mark Antony - EP 1
programme.desc: Mark, the son of a former gangster, comes across a mobile phone that can time-travel. Using the phone, Mark acquires the ability to save his estranged mother from a grim fate.

programme.title: Sowkarpettai - EP 1
programme.desc: A couple is all set to get married, but an evil businessman kill them. The lovers then return as spirits to exact revenge on their perpetrators.

programme.title: Freetcket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Irumbu Thirai - EP 1
programme.desc: A military officer borrows money for his sister's marriage using fake papers. When the money goes missing from his account, he embarks on an investigation that uncovers a hacker.

programme.title: Junga - EP 1
programme.desc: Junga is involved in a fight, because of which his family loses the theatre that they own. In order to get it back, he devises a plan that takes him to Paris, where he fights a criminal gang.

programme.title: Boomerang - EP 1
programme.desc: After an accident, a young man undergoes major facial surgery. When he discovers people are after his life, he sets out to uncover the reason behind it.

programme.title: Annapoorani - EP 1
programme.desc: A girl born in an orthodox family aspires to become India's best chef. She faces events and challenges on her way and goes beyond her conventional beliefs and prejudices to achieve her dream.

programme.title: Yaanai - EP 1
programme.desc: In Ramnad, PRV juggles life with his two wives and kids while facing blame from another family for his brother's death. Tensions rise as their stories intertwine.

programme.title: Bhairavakottai - EP 1
programme.desc: Basava and John, in a heist gone wrong, stumble upon mysteries in Bhairavakona, unraveling its secrets with Geetha's help.

programme.title: Karumegangal Kalaigindrana - EP 1
programme.desc: The Story is about Human Emotions and how to value the family when they are within reach 'NOT' after you realize you had lost. A family without a strong foundation and values will disintegrate.

programme.title: Vantha Rajavathan Varuven - EP 1
programme.desc: Aadhi, posing as a driver, tries to reunite his grandfather with his estranged daughter Nandhini, but unexpected troubles arise in the process.

programme.title: Mohini - EP 1
programme.desc: Vaishnavi and Sandeep, an engaged couple, face chaos when Vaishnavi is possessed by a vengeful lookalike, threatening their relationship and future.

programme.title: Freetcket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Virupaksha - EP 1
programme.desc: When a man visits his ancestral village, where terror reigns after a chain of unexplained deaths, he must unravel mystical secrets before it's too late.

programme.title: Vadacurry - EP 1
programme.desc: Sathish, who is ashamed of his cheap phone, gives in to temptation when he finds one lying unattended in a shop and steals it. Unfortunately for him, the phone belongs to someone dangerous.

programme.title: Thimmarasan - EP 1
programme.desc: After realising an innocent man has been framed for a murder he did not commit, a lawyer decides to bring the true perpetrators to justice.

programme.title: August 16 1947 - EP 1
programme.desc: Amid India's independence celebration, the news fails to reach Sengadu, a remote village oppressed by Robert Clive. Param rises to lead the liberation of the villagers.

programme.title: Ivan Kavalkaran - EP 1
programme.desc: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

programme.title: Vadagupatty Ramasamy - EP 1
programme.desc: A greedy con artist exploits his village's superstitions for profit. When his main cash cow, the temple, closes, he hilariously schemes to reopen it and regain his fortune.

programme.title: Ghosty - EP 1
programme.desc: Police officer, pursuing outlaw who escaped her father's custody 20 years ago, accidentally shoots someone else in a failed shootout.

programme.title: Movie - Marutha
programme.desc: Brazen money lender Kaali's husband gifts a large amount as seimurai to his doting sister's family event. Unable to return the favour, Meenakshi's husband ends his life. Can Meenakshi regain her honour when Kaali arranges a seimurai after 20 years?

programme.title: Movie - Thunichal
programme.desc: A man is so obsessed with the girl he loves that when he is unable to obtain her, he creates a vicious plan to ruin her life. For this, he even commits murders.

programme.title: Movie - Eesa
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of saltpan workers. One of the workers decides to revolt against his employers when his family is destroyed due to their oppressive and cruel ways.

programme.title: Movie - Sakthi
programme.desc: After Sakthi foils Sethupati's attempt to steal the temple idols and jewels, he begins to guard the temple himself. He also learns that Sita, a woman ostracised by the village, is actually his mother.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Maraivaasi
programme.desc: A billionaire's son returns after his father's death and joins the company as a regular employee in order to nab the people responsible for his father's murder.

programme.title: Movie - Kaathaludan
programme.desc: A talented magician pursues to know more about the girl he is arranged to marry. He begins to admire her and help her family with their debts. Soon, he learns that she is in love with another man, and helps them to get married.

programme.title: Movie - Vetri Vizha
programme.desc: After a fatal accident, a man suffers from amnesia. However, when flashes from his past help him discover his combat skills, he sets out on a mission to find his true identity.

programme.title: Movie - Appu
programme.desc: Taxi driver Appu is haunted by his past when his sister was killed by a eunuch who was also a powerful pimp. While trying to find him, he comes across another girl who is about to meet with the same fate.

programme.title: Movie - Gajendra
programme.desc: Gajendra, an orphan, is brought up by his wealthy master and soon is to marry the latter's granddaughter. However, he also has a soft spot for a mentally-deranged girl for reasons best known to him.

programme.title: Movie - Arpudham
programme.desc: Ashok is a careless man with no respect for hard work. He falls for Priya who rejects him. When he threatens to kill himself, she reminds him that he's a nobody. He decides to make a mark for himself.

programme.title: Movie - Pudhu Kudithanam
programme.desc: Ashok is a very obedient son, and his mother would like an equally submissive daughter-in-law so that she does not influence him. But Ashok secretly marries Nila, who actually dislikes this situation.

programme.title: Movie - Murattu Kaathal
programme.desc: Merlin is a pop star who meets Ramesh in a park. After a few events, she realises that he's an unhinged stalker. The reason for his behaviour is linked to his traumatic past and a song sung by Merlin.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vazhve Mayam
programme.desc: Raja and Devi fall in love with each other and get engaged. However, when Raja learns that he is suffering from cancer, he hides it from Devi and calls off the engagement.

programme.title: Movie - Meendum Savithri
programme.desc: Manju, a middle-class woman, meets Vasudevan, who seems to be the perfect future husband. She gets married to him but later discovers that he is already married to another woman, Uma.

programme.title: Movie - Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Sudhanthiram
programme.desc: Two brothers, who always look out for each other, start working for a gangster after their father's death. But both of them get into a conflict when the younger one decides to testify against the gangster for a murder he committed.

programme.title: Movie - Samy
programme.desc: A policeman accepts bribes from corrupt politicians and local thugs to help them in their illegal work. However, he decides to correct his mistakes after he falls in love with a woman.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2007/2008 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES - EP 3
programme.desc: Will Perry is joined by former Chelsea player Scott Minto and Manchester City icon Shaun Wright-Phillips as they delve into the memorable moments, and rivalries between the two giants of English football.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 34
programme.desc: We look back at all the very best moments of the 2025/2026 season so far. An action-packed show filled with exciting Premier League programming and digital content.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44
programme.desc: With exclusive behind-the-scenes access, PL Stories spends time with Yakubu Aiyegbeni at Finchley Boxing Club, where he is forging a new path in the next chapter of his sporting life. We explore his growing passion for boxing and the discipline it demands, offering a fresh perspective on life after football. Alongside this new pursuit, Yakubu reflects on his remarkable journey from his early years in Nigeria to becoming one of the Premier League's most prolific and respected strikers.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 34
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 31
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - JOE COLE
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club. With guest Joe Cole.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 17 MAR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 30, as Burnley host Bournemouth, Chelsea face Newcastle, Tottenham Hotspur visit Liverpool, and Manchester United take on Aston Villa at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We sit down with Claude Makelele to reflect on the career of a true midfield master. Celebrated for redefining the defensive midfield role, Makelele shares his memories of life in the Premier League, from joining Chelsea during a transformative era to becoming the heartbeat of a title-winning side. With insight from teammates, coaches, and opponents, we explore the intelligence, discipline, and influence that made his name synonymous with the position he perfected.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Dricus Du Plessis vs. Rafal Haratyk
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by an incredible middleweight fight that ends with a tapout between Dricus Du Plessis and Rafal Haratyk. Bonus coverage includes a middleweight melee that ends in submission between Mark Hulme and Gordon Roodman and a female strawweight fight that goes the distance between Danella Eliasov and Irene Rivera.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Gabriel Martinez vs. Serhiy Dzinziruk
programme.desc: This episode features a bout for the vacant WBC diamond middleweight title, as Sergio Gabriel 'Maravilla' Martinez (46-2, 25 KOs) takes on fellow southpaw Serhiy Dzinziruk, aka 'Dzyna Razor' (37-0. 24 KOs). This fight took place from Foxwoods Resort Casino in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA, on March 12, 2011. Martinez was the reigning Fighter of the Year coming into the fight and vacated his WBC Middleweight title in order to fight the undefeated former champion Dzinziruk.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of knockout artists as Victor Ortiz, entering with eight straight knockout wins, faces Marcos Maidana, who has knockouts in 24 of his 25 victories. The winner of this bout will be crowned the interim WBA light welterweight champion.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Chiyotairyu, Ryuden, Asanoyama and Takarafuji.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about how the use of motion animation technology can help martial artists learn more efficient ways to put extra power behind their punches and kicks.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: WCCB Osleys Iglesias vs. Vladimir Shishkin
programme.desc: From the Montreal Casino in Canada, the undefeated IBO Super Middleweight Champion, Osleys Iglesias, looks to defend his title against top-ranked Vladimir Shishkin. The bout will also determine the mandatory challenger for the IBF World Championship in the division, currently held by Canelo Alvarez. Both fighters are ranked inside the top 5 according to several world rankings, with Iglesias ranked #3 and Shishkin #2 in the world by the IBF.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Adrien Broner taking on Martin Rodriguez to determine the new WBO super featherweight world champion. programme.desc: This episode features interviews with 2-time UFC heavyweight champion Frank Mir where he discusses his "Legend" Status and his UFC debut, as well as an interview with his wife and manager Jenny Mir and how she juggles motherhood and her husband's career. programme.desc: Ffrom Heidelberg, Germany, a championship tripleheader takes place headlined by Tina Rupprecht of Germany and Eri Matsuda of Japan competing for the WBC and WBO Women's Atomweight World Championships. programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of fighters who have just one loss to their record, as Ricky Hatton battles Paulie Malignaggi in a light welterweight championship bout that was billed as "Power vs. Precision." programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Tokushoryu, Yutakayama, Asanoyama and Shodai.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 78
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Uppy Downy. They have fun going up down, down up!

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'socks' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different socks - summer socks, cosy socks, toes-y socks and even super socks!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Messy's hiccups cause a landslide while he is out on a nature walk. Will he be able to find his way home? And will he ever stop hiccupping?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 18
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 35
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 3
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 2
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters and also from a sneezy Grandmaster Glitch's germs.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 34
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 37
programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari-sub to the coast of South Africa in search of an octopus.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is visiting London and spots the perfect souvenir hat. But he's run out of pocket money, so he decides to earn some as a tour guide.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Glitch sinks in the Panama Canal and needs saving... again.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 5
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Sarah's hoping for a nice quiet birthday, but there's no chance once her friends arrive.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Ribbon Sisters invite Sarah and Duck to their favourite seasonal event in the park.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: The children want to make a big dinosaur model so they can learn all about it. They make such a huge dinosaur that they want to take it to the museum to be shown as an exhibit.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Stanley helps Little Woo and Seamus fly their new kite. It gets stuck up a tree and breaks. Using leaves and sticks, they build a better one, only for that to get stuck.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a sleepover. JoJo loves to look at the night sky, so Gran Gran suggests that they go stargazing in the garden. What can they spot in the night sky? Are there more constellations to find?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 31
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 32
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 37
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 36
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 51
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 25

programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 218
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 110
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 108
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Turbo must become a hero by saving the city from a menacing tiger beetle, who has challenged him to a race on an insane stunt-filled obstacle course.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When White Shadow is invited to play a daring sport against his hero, an athletic dung beetle, the crew is worried he doesn't know the game is fixed. // Chet gets taken by a con artist gecko and bets Turbo's shell. When Turbo is challenged, he must go slow to try to beat the gecko at his own game.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Archibald hits the high seas to help out endangered turtles. It's Archibald to the rescue when the citizens of Crackridge report a series of thefts.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: All the toys are ready to start the exciting DareDale Challenge race, which culminates in the competitors successfully completing the Crystal Memory Game in the DareDale Caves. Before the race can start everyone is disappointed to discover that the Crystal Memory Game has been broken. Whilst Clockwork Mouse gets the game mended, Noddy must investigate who broke the game so that they don't break it again.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: It's the day of the Best Toy Award in Toyland and Fuse is the winner! He's very excited but when his new dressing up eyebrows that he wanted to wear to the ceremony go missing, he's devastated. It's up the Noddy to investigate who has taken the amazing eyebrows so that he can get them back to Fuse before the ceremony starts.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about singing sea shanties in the big Pirate Party in Toyland. But when Scurvy the Parrot arrives at Toy Green all on his own Noddy soon realises that the pirates are missing.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Noddy's new music player starts a craze for the latest dance, the Toy Twist. He decides to have a big dance party that night! All his friends are excited apart from Smartysaurus, who can't dance. When the music player goes missing, Noddy must use all his investigative skills of listening, looking and following clues on the WhoWhatWhere Tablet to find out who has taken the music player and why.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Lion had lost his roar. Crocodile was snapping at all the animals in the Waterhole and Lion opened his big mouth but nothing came out! Tiny Flea tells Lion that if he dares to enter the Great Cave of Tinga Tinga then maybe he will find his roar. Lion plucks up courage and goes into the Great Cave. He roars with all his might, but a bigger roar comes back! Lion stands strong. He roars again and an even bigger roar comes back.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Zebra was once very easy to spot in Tinga Tinga as he was bright white all over. This very annoying as all he wanted was to be left alone to munch on yummy grass and get fat. One day, Eagle arrives at the Watering Hole with a new pair of sharp talons saying that she found them in the Great Cave. The animals excitedly rush to find something for themselves. Zebra accompanies Tortoise and the Monkeys into the Cave where they discover the last remaining item; a plain black coat.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Pat must deliver eggs, milk, flour and butter to Greendale for the annual Pancake Race. But when Michael mixes all the ingredients together, Pat finds that he instead has to deal with a mixing bowl full to the brim with pancake mix... Meanwhile in Greendale, Sara's attempts at pancake-tossing aren't going well and she soon loses her pancake under the wheels of PC Selby's car.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Pat doesn't realise today's Special Delivery, a super all-in-one remote control, is quite as powerful as it is! As Jess falls asleep on the buttons, machines all around Pencaster start going haywire. Waiting for the remote, Charlie and Julian are installing a futuristic 'Shop a Bot 3000' robot sales assistant for Mrs Goggins, but they make the mistake of turning it on before the controller arrives. Pat struggles to make his delivery before the shop robot does too much damage!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: A professional paper airplane thrower hires Archibald to be his caddie. While floating through the sky, Archibald bumps into birds who live in a blimp.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Archibald stumbles upon a crime in progress while trapped in the mall overnight. A whale's tattooed map inspires Archibald to go on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening in Brickabuild. Clockwork Mouse is giving all sorts of confusing orders to the builders and everything is chaos. Noddy realises that someone has put sticky putty on her clockwork key and it's making her run slowly. Noddy decides to investigate and find out who could have tried to damage the little mouse.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Something strange is happening in Toyland - trees are falling down and machines are going crazy. What's going on? Noddy needs to use all his investigating skills to find out who is causing all the accidents before someone gets hurt. He realises that Deltoid is trying to help and be a superhero but hasn't realised that his superstrength is causing chaos! Noddy shows him how to be a super helpful superhero without causing anymore accidents! Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Everyone is going to play Hide and Seek in Brickabuild but Fuse stops the game because someone has painted the big wall outside his workshop blue! What if they do it again? Or if they decide to paint the rest of Brickabuild? Noddy uses all his investigating skills of who, what, where, when, why and how to work out that the wall must have been painted by someone very tall who likes the colour blue.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Pirates are searching for the long-lost Fable Forest Gold. If they can't find it they might have to stop being pirates for good! Noddy leaps into action to help them. Using all his investigating skills, asking who, what, where, when, why and how and with the help of the wwwbook Noddy follows the clues and finds the gold! Now the pirates can stay in Toyland and hunt for treasure forever! Hurrah for Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When the other dragons come down with the flu, Summer must overcome her fear of eels to retrieve the cure and get her friends back in the air.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Magnus hatches a plan to hide in an egg to spy on the Rescue Riders. But things get all scrambled when a mama dragon takes him to her nest.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Harper's drone flies away it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it back. And while Eden wishes she could fly like a drone, she learns that she can do great things with or without wings. / When Dylan loses his first tooth the Dew Drops learn that the Tooth Fairy will be coming and Athena tries so hard to make a good impression that she almost ruins Dylan's first lost tooth experience.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening in Brickabuild. Clockwork Mouse is giving all sorts of confusing orders to the builders and everything is chaos. Noddy realises that someone has put sticky putty on her clockwork key and it's making her run slowly. Noddy decides to investigate and find out who could have tried to damage the little mouse.

Noddy shows him how to be a super helpful superhero without causing anymore accidents! Well done Noddy!

Or if they decide to paint the rest of Brickabuild? Noddy uses all his investigating skills of who, what, where, when, why and how to work out that the wall must have been painted by someone very tall who likes the colour blue.

Using all his investigating skills, asking who, what, where, when, why and how and with the help of the wwwbook Noddy follows the clues and finds the gold! Now the pirates can stay in Toyland and hunt for treasure forever! Hurrah for Noddy!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first "tuskist" appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Pawston is celebrating the 40th anniversary of Grandmaw and Grandpaw's Pawtomotive Garage! As a surprise, Tag and Paw decide to track down items to recreate the garage to look like it did when it first opened while the rest of the family distract the Grandpawrents. / Tag and Wind face off in the Lasagna Games for a chance to be Sam’s new Crew Chief. A series of lasagna-themed games will challenge their speed, fix-it skills, and leadership. But there can only be one winner.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: When Tag finds out that Pawston has a chance to host the Dogcathalon Race, she and Scooch rush around to create a movie to show why their city should host. Unfortunately everything seems to go wrong. Will Tag and Scooch be able to save their movie before time runs out? / When Tag's construction project accidentally damages Frank and Beans’ house, she invites them to stay with her family during repairs. Tag does her best to keep Frank and Beans busy so they don’t get in the Barkers’ way.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Ton-Ton's friends, The 'Dumps, visit the Flatirons but are too wild and crazy for the crew, so the Dinotrux build a racetrack perfect for joyriding.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: When Lucky and the PALs arrive home from the circus, they find that Maricela and her new bicycle have become the star attraction in Miradero

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: Grug tries to solve the mystery of where Munk's family is /Eep refuses to join in when Ahhh! Valley celebrates their first holiday, "Howl Day"

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: After rescuing Kevin and almost having a first kiss, Eep sets up dangerous situations to recreate the moment; Grug and Snoot go on a rescue/mission

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Fireworms invade Dragon's Edge, while Ruffnut and Tuffnut discover that they have an unexpected connection to the island.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: As a Rumblehorn wreaks havoc on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup seeks the help of Stoick - who forms an unexpected bond with the rampaging beast.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Mega Fat tries to get Boss Baby fired while on an airplane to Pairs, Tim and Staci must prevent a baby meltdown

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: When baby families are leaving town, Boss Baby and Tim battle to prove Bootsy is behind it all

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When Mega Fat CEO Baby claims he has dirt that could get Boss Baby fired, Boss Baby and the team try to find a way to get it first!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp’s locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When Hiccup and the Riders discover that Viggo is using two captured Catastrophic Quakens to build a dragon prison, they must help the dragons escape.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: When Dagur comes to Dragon's Edge looking for Heather, Hiccup tries to keep the two siblings apart by teaching Dagur the art of Dragon Riding.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: Jim and his friends are trapped in detention while tensions in Trollmarket escalate with fears of Gunmar's escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Jim is given the chance to see what life would be like if he had never picked up the Amulet

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Jim must go to trial for releasing Gunmar from the Darklands

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Blade tells Po the truth about Alfie. The group chases after Klaus and Veruca in an epic snowy mountain chase, culminating in Po saving Blade’s life as the weasels take off with the gauntlet and the whip. Rukhmini reveals that she actually has the real whip in her staff, and she knows where to go to get the next one: India.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The team arrives in India where an old friend of Rukhmini can supposedly give them a pendant that will lead to the next Tianshang weapon. But when they arrive, they find that Rukhmini’s hometown has changed a lot in the thirty years she’s been gone, and her old friend Diya might not be willing to help them.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: With the Mothership ready for liftoff, Aja and Krel celebrate their last day on Earth at Battle of the Bands. But their world is rocked when Zadra arrives with a startling revelation about Vex - and a new enemy threatens their departure.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: A near-accident gives Chet his first adrenaline rush, and in his quest for another he enters a dangerous race inside a pinball machine. // The FAST team must work together to keep a group of sewer surfing roaches from entering the taco stand so that Tito can pass his health inspection.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: The FAST crew is tricked into going to Africa by the Queen of the Banana Slugs for a dangerous journey through the plains in order to save her tribe. // White Shadow is challenged by three over-zealous and over-sized championship sumo wrestler snails to an outrageous wrestling match.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Archibald hides inside Loy's robot after accidentally breaking it. A lost boomerang leads to a job working for a fancy singer.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Everyone in Brickabuild keeps falling asleep and no one can get any building work finished. It's all because the lights keep coming on all night! Noddy decides to investigate who is turning the lights on. Bravely overcoming his own fear of the dark, he follows the clues to discover that the lights are being secretly turned on by a scared Carlton, who doesn't like the dark.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Someone is giving presents to everyone in Toyland and all the toys want to say thank you but no one knows the identity of the secret gift giver! It's up to Noddy to investigate and find out who is it that's leaving presents for all the friends. By following clues and using his investigation skills, Noddy follows the trail to Animal Acres and discovers that Pat Pat and the Pockets are the secret gift-givers.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is delighted because a little clockwork duck has appeared at the DinoLab. No one knows where she belongs but Noddy is sure that her family must be missing her so he decides to investigate and find her home. Noddy uses all his skills of thinking, looking, listening and asking questions to find the home for the little duck.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Something very strange is happening in Toyland. Lots of things seem to be jumping in a particular direction for no reason - Revs, Noddy's bell, Big Ear's spoons and kettle. What is going on? Noddy decides to investigate and help his best friend Revs who is very upset.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Flamingo stood on both legs. One morning, Flamingo and her flock landed at the Water Hole when all the crabs were busy performing their underwater dance. Needless to say, all these legs where in their way! Tortoise came up with the plan that if all Crabs each nipped a flamingo leg, there will be room to share the waterhole. So from then on, Flamingo stood on one legs and Crabs were able to perform their dance in the watering hole

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Woodpecker didn't peck. All the birds had their very own sound, but Woodpecker didn't make a sound at all.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Ted and PC Selby are building a zipwire to run from Greendale Crag all the way down into the valley. The kids are on a hike, led by Lauren which is due to culminate at the zipwire - the only trouble is, it's not built yet! Pat and Jess have to race against time to deliver the huge steel cable to the top of the crag before the kids get there.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 8
programme.desc: Julian and the kids at Greendale School are excited about a Festival of flight - Ted's coming to talk about aviation and Alf's bringing Cedric the racing pigeon. Pat has to deliver special jet boots to the school, built by Ted's inventor friend. Ted will demonstrate them. But on the way to Greendale, Pat stops to help Alf, whose cows have got loose. Pat sees Ajay, out for a day's bird-watching.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Uh, oh - Archibald accidentally drinks all of Finly's vocal-enhancing tea on the eve of his brother's big concert!

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It's Archibald to the rescue when Loy, Sage and Finly come down with a bad case of the Déjà Flu. Archibald and Cousin Ashley take over the airwaves.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: One of the Knights has tried a magic spell but it went wrong and he's shrunk! Queen Sparklewings could help him but she's hiding and won't come out. It's up to Noddy to investigate and work out why the Queen is hiding and how to persuade her to help the Knight grow again.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: There's a mystery in Toyland! All the toys have drawn pictures of Deltoid but they've all been scribbled on and ruined! Noddy opens the investigation to find out who is the mystery artist. Using his wwwbook to follow the clues, Noddy realises that it's Deltoid who was drawing on all the pictures because he didn't think any of them look like him! Noddy suggests that they draw pictures again - and this time Deltoid can draw his own picture too. Clever Noddy's saved the day!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: It's Bling's birthday and she is so excited that she keeps opening all her presents before her party. Noddy needs to make sure she doesn't open the storybook present from him and Big Ears early - but he's got to find it first! Big Ears has hidden it and can't remember where he's put it! Noddy launches his investigation to find the missing present before Bling does. Using his investigating skills Noddy follows the clues all over Toyland to find the present before the impatient little Naughticorn.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Fuse has a new electronic ball. Noddy suggests that they invite everyone to play with it later. Fuse agrees but when Noddy returns with the other toys there is a big brick wall in front of the workshop. No one can get in and there's no sign of Fuse! Noddy uses all his investigating skills to follow the clues. He discovers that Fuse built the brick wall to stop his friends coming into the workshop because he was worried his new electronic ball might get broken.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 55
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade.
